basic_details.job_title: Engineering Projects India Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Engineering Projects India Graduate Apprentice (Civil) Notification 2026 has been released on 02-05-2026 on the official website epil.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the EPI Graduate Apprentice (Civil) Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 18 years and 30 years who have BE/B.Tech in Civil Engineering with not less than 55% marks from an AICTE-approved Institute/University are eligible to apply for these Graduate Apprentice (Civil) vacancies. The email application process for EPI Graduate Apprentice (Civil) Recruitment 2026 has started on 02-05-2026 and will remain o

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 30 years Age relaxation is applicable: 05 years for SC/ST & 03 years for OBC (Non-Creamy Layer).

qualification.details: BE/B.Tech (Civil) with not less than 55% marks from a reputed Institute/University approved by AICTE.

selection_process: Merit list based on marks secured in Minimum required Educational Qualification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Engineering Projects India Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Graduate Apprentice (Civil) post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 23rd May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BE/B.Tech in Civil Engineering with at least 55% marks from an AICTE-approved institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Graduate Apprentice (Civil) position?
faq.answer: The age limit is between 18 to 30 years, with relaxations for SC/ST and OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Graduate Apprentice (Civil) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 10,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Graduate Apprentice (Civil) post?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on a merit list compiled from the marks obtained in the minimum required educational qualification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category of candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Graduate Apprentice (Civil) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Graduate Apprentice (Civil) position.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this Graduate Apprentice (Civil) position?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the location of this job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Kolkata, West Bengal.
